text: polos shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha 'al-pi mitsevat haelohim moshi'enu vehaadon yeshu'a hamashicha tiqevatenu
el-timotios beno haamiti baemuna chesed verachamim veshalom meet elohim avinu vehamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
hine belekheti lemaqedoneya biqasheti mimekha lashevet beefesos lema'an tetsave miqetsat anashim levileti horot tora zara
velo yasimu libam lehagadot ulelimudey toladot sheeyn-lahem sof hameviim lisheelot velo livenot beyt-elohim baemuna
ki-takhelit hamitseva hi haahava belev tahor uveda'at neqiya uveemuna lo-tsevu'a
yesh asher ta'u midarekah vayifenu acharey limudey havel
chafetsim liheyot morey tora veeynam yode'im ma hem omerim uma hem danim 'alayv
aval yada'enu ki hatora tova im-yishetamesh bah haadam katora
beda'eto zot shehachoq lo husam latsadiq ki im ba'avur hapshe'im vehamoredim haresha'im vehachataim temeim unevalim makey-av umakey-em umeratsechim
vezonim veshokhevim et-zakhar vegonevey nefesh veshaqeranim venisheba'im lashaqer vekhal-ma'ase hefekh min-haleqach habari
kefi vesorat kevod hael hamevorakh asher hifeqid beyadi
vehineni mode leyeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu hameazereni chayil asher raani neeman vayesimeni limesharet lo
asher milefanim hayiti megadef umeradef umecharef aval ruchameti ki 'asiti mibeli-da'at beeyn emuna
vayigedal 'alay bimeod meod chesed adoneynu 'im-haemuna vehaahava bamashicha yeshu'a
neeman hadavar verauy lakol lehiteqabel shehamashicha yeshu'a ba la'olam lehoshi'a et-hachataim asher anokhi hagadol bahem
uva'avur zot ruchameti lema'an asher yaree yeshu'a hamashicha bi varishona et-kal-orekh rucho liheyoti leot lekhol asher-yavou lehaamin bo liheyot lahem chayey 'olam
umelekh 'olamim haelohim haqayam la'ad vehane'elam me'ayin vehechakham levado lo hakavod vehehadar le'olemey 'olamim amen
et-hamitseva hazot ani metsavekha beni timotios kefi hanevuot haqodemot 'aleykha asher tilachem 'al-yadan hamilechama hatova
leechoz baemuna uveda'at neqiya asher-yesh moasim bah vatishaver oniyat emunatam
umehem humenios vaalekhesanederos asher mesaretim lasatan lema'an yivaseru levileti gadef 'od
ve'ata qodem kal-davar avaqesha mikem laset tefilot vetachanunim uvaqashot vetodot be'ad kal-beney adam
be'ad hamelakhim vekhal-hashalitim lema'an nicheye chayey hasheqet vavetach bekhal-chasidut vaysher
ki-khen tov veratsuy be'eyney elohim moshi'enu
asher chefetso ki yivashe'u kal-beney haadam viqabelu da'at haemet
ki echad haelohim veechad hasaresor beyn elohim uveyn beney adam hu ven-adam hamashicha yeshu'a
asher natan et-nafesho kofer be'ad hakol vezot ha'edut habaa be'itah
asher ani hafeqadeti lah lekharoz uleshalicha emet ani magid bamashicha velo ashaqer more hagoyim beemuna uveemet
lakhen retsoni sheyitepalalu haanashim bekhal-maqom veyiseu yedeyhem qodesh beli-rogez umezimot
vekhen gam-hanashim titeyapeyna betilebshet naa bevshet panim utseni'ut lo bemachelefot harosh lo vezahav lo vifeninim velo bemalebushim yeqarim
ela bema'asim tovim karauy lanashim asher bacharu lahen yireat elohim
haisha tilemad dumam bekhal-hakhena'a
veeyneni noten reshut laisha lelamed af lo lehitenase 'al-haish akh tidom
ki adam notsar barishona veacharayv chava
veadam lo nifeta ki im-haisha shame'a leqol hamesit vatavo lidey 'avera
aval tivasha' belidetah banim im ta'amodena baemuna uvaahava uvaqedusha 'im-hatseni'ut
emet hadavar ish ki-yevaqesh liheyot hegemon lema'ase tov miteave
vehegemon ha'eda tsarikh liheyot beeyn dofi ba'al-isha achat mshel berucho tsanu'a venechemad laberiot makhenis orechim umevin lelamed velo ohev yayin velo-va'al egerof velo votse'a betsa' ra'
ki im-dan lekhaf-zekhut velo ish mideyanim velo ohev kasef
vihi manehig et-beyto betov umaderikh et-banayv lemishema'eto bekhal-haysher
ki im-lo yeda' ish lehanehig et-beyto eykhakha yukhal lehashegicha 'al-'adat elohim
veal-yehi talemid chadash pen-yirehav libo veyipol bedin hamasetin
vehu gam-tsarikh heyot lo shem tov befi otam shebachuts pen-yipol becherepa uvemoqesh hamasetin
vekhen gam-hashamashim yiheyu yesharim velo machaliqey lashon velo ohavim sevo-yayin velo notim acharey vetsa'-ra'
ki im-yishemeru et-sod haemuna berucha tehora
vegam-hem yibachanu varishona veachar ken yeshameshu im-eyn bahem dofi
vekhen hanashim tiheyeyna yesharot velo maleshinot mshelot beruchan veneemanot bakol
hashamashim yiheyu khal-echad ba'al-isha echat umenahalim betov et-beneyhem veet-bateyhem
ki hameshameshim kahogen yiqenu lenafesham ma'ala tova uvitachon rav beemunat hamashicha yeshu'a
zot ani khotev lekha vaaqave lavo eleykha bimehera
veim-etemahemah hine teda' eykh lehitenaheg beveyt haelohim asher hi 'adat elohim chayim 'amud haemet umekhonah
uvevaday gadol sod hachasidut asher nigela vabasar nitsedaq barucha nirea lamaleakhim hugad bagoyim niteqabel beemuna ba'olam na'ala bekhavod
veharucha magid beferush ki beacharit hayamim yasuru min-haemuna lifenot el-haruchot hamate'ot veel-torot hashedim
doverey sheqer bachanupa venikhevim bemada'am
oserim laqachat isha umone'im miminey maakhal asher beraam haelohim sheyokhelum betoda hamaaminim veyode'ey haemet
ki khal-beriyat elohim tova veeyn davar meshuqats uvilevad sheyeakhel biverakha
ki yequdash bidevar elohim uvitefila
im-tasim kazot lifeney acheykha mesharet tov tiheye leyeshu'a hamashicha megudal bediverey haemuna uvaleqach hatov asher davaqeta acharayv
akh hiteracheq mehagadot pesulot uvalot veharegel nafeshekha bachasidut
ki tiregul haguf yo'il me'at aval hachasidut to'il lekhal-davar velah havetachat chayey ha'olam haze veha'olam haba
emet hadavar haze verauy lakol lehiteqabel
ki lazot anachenu yege'im vene'elavim 'al-asher hochalenu lelohim chayim hamoshi'a lekhal-haadam ve'al-kulam lamaaminim
zot tetsave utelamed
al-yavuz ish et-bechuroteykha raq heye mofet lamaaminim bedibur bema'ase beahava berucha beemuna uvetahora
veheye shaqud liqero ulehokhicha ulehorot 'ad-boi
veal-teqal be'eyneykha matenat hachesed asher bakh hanetuna lekha bidevar nevua uvisemikhat yedey hazeqenim
laele tashit libekha uvahem heye lema'an terae hatselachatekha lakol
shit libekha lenafeshekha velahoraa vehachazeq baele ki-va'asotekha khen gam et-nafeshekha toshi'a vegam et-nefesh hashome'im eleykha
al-tige'ar bezaqen ki im-tazehirenu keav-lakh veet-hatse'irim keachim
et-hazeqenot keimot veet-hatse'irot kaachayot bekhal-tahora
kabed et-haalemanot asher beemet alemanot hena
vekhi-yiheyu lealemana banim o-veney vanim hem yilemedu larishona la'asot chesed 'im-beytam uleshalem gemul laavotam ki tov hu veratsuy lifeney haelohim
vehaalemana veemet asher nisheara yechida tasim belohim mivetachah vehi matemedet bitefilot uvitechinot layela veyomam
akh hame'unaga meta hi bechayeyha
vezot tetsave lema'an tiheyeyna belo-dofi
vaasher lo yekhalekel et-qerovayv ve'al-kulam et-beney veyto kafar baemuna vera' hu measher eynenu maamin
alemana al-tibacher zulati bat-shishim shana vaasher hayeta eshet ish echad
veyesh-lah 'edut 'al-ma'aseyha hatovim ki gidela vanim vehikhenisa orechim verachatsa et-rageley haqedshim vetamekha et-ha'ashuqim veradefa kal-ma'ase tov
aval haalemanot hatse'irot al-teqabel ki behatot yitseran et-liban meacharey-hamashicha chsheqot hen liheyot leish
vedinan 'aleyhen shebagedu beemunatan harishona
ve'od biheyotan 'atselot lamedu leshotet mibayit lavayit velo 'atselot bilevad ela afilu botot verodefot achar hahevel medaberot et-asher lo yitakhen
'al-ken retsoni shehatse'irot tiheyeyna leish laledet banim ulehanehig et-bateyhen velo latet laoyev maqom lecharef
ki-yesh mehen shekevar saru acharey hasatan
vekhi tiheyeyna alemanot beveyt maamin o maamina te'ase lahen parenasa velo tiheyeyna lemasa 'al-haqahal lema'an yukhal lehasepiq leotan shehen alemanot beemet
hazeqenim hameytivim lenahel reuyim hem lemishene khavod ve'al-kulam ha'amelim badavar uvahoraa
ki-hakatuv omer lo-tachesom shor bedisho veneemar rauy hapo'el lisekharo
al-teqabel 'edut bazaqen bileti im-'al-pi shenayim o-shelsha 'edim
et-hachoteim tokhicha bifeney khol lema'an yireu gam-haacherim
hineni me'id bekha neged haelohim vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha veneged hamaleakhim bechirey-yah asher-tishemor et-hadevarim haele velo tishepot beeyn chaqira velo-ta'ase davar bemas fanim
al-tehi nivehal lisemokh yadeykha 'al-adam velo tishetatef bechatot acherim shemor et-nafeshekha betahora
al-tishete 'od mayim harebe ela me'at-yayin mipeney me'eykha umipeney shepe'amim harebe chole ata
yesh beney-adam asher-chatoteyhem geluyot umaqedimot lamishepat veyesh mehem asher hena baot achareyhem
vekhakha gam-hama'asim hatovim geluyim hema vaasher lo-khen lo yukhelu lehisater
kol asher-'ol ha'avedut 'aleyhem yiheyu adoneyhem be'eyneyhem reuyim lekhal-kavod lema'an asher lo-yechulal shem haelohim vehaleqach
veotam sheadoneyhem maaminim al-yeqalu ve'eyneyhem mipeney shehem achim ki im-ya'avedu otam yoter mipeney shemaaminim vaahuvim hem hameqabelim et-hatova et-zot telamed utetsave
haish asher yore tora acheret velo ya'amod bediverey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha haberiim uveleqach hachasidut
nafesho 'upela velo yada' meuma ki im-chole hu bisheelot vetokhechot milim hamolidot qinea umeriva vegidufim vachashad ra'
vikuchey hevel meanashim nishechatey da'at umechuserey emet hasamim et-hachasidut lidevar batsa' sur meanashim kaele
veamenam betsa' gadol hi hachasidut 'im-lev samecha becheleqo
ki vanu la'olam veeyn beyadeynu meuma veyadu'a sheaf netse mimenu veeyn beyadeynu meuma
ve'al-ken im mazon ukhesut lanu nisetapeqa bahem
aval hamevaqeshim leha'ashir yavou lidey nisayon veyipelu vemoqeshim uverov taaot sekhalot umashechitot hamasheqi'ot et-haadam bashachat uvaavadon
ki shoresh kal-hara'ot ahavat hakasef veyesh lehutim acharayv asher saru min-haemuna vaya'atsivu et-nafesham bemakheovim rabim
veata ish haelohim berach-lekha meele uredof tsedaqa vachasidut veemuna veahava vesavelanut va'anava
hilachem hamilechama hatova milechemet haemuna veechoz et-chayey ha'olamim asher niqereta lahem vehodeyta hodaa yafa bifeney 'edim rabim
hineni metsavekha neged haelohim hamechaye et-kol veneged hamashicha yeshu'a asher he'id hahodaa hayafa lifeney panetios pilatos
asher tishemor et-hamitseva beeyn-shemets vadofi 'ad-hofa'at hamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
asher yareena ve'itah hamevorakh vehashalit levado melekh hamelakhim vaadoney haadonim
asher hu levado chay veqayam vehu shokhen or nisegav veish lo raahu velo yukhal lireoto velo hakavod ugevurat 'olamim amen
et-'ashirey ha'olam haze tetsave shel yarum levavam velo-yivetechu ba'oser haboged ki im-belohim chayim hamasepiq lanu day vehoter lisebo'a
veyigemelu tov veya'eshiru bema'asim tovim latet mehonam vela'azor lezulatam
veyaatseru lahem otsar lisod tov le'atid lavo lema'an yasigu et-chayey haemet
ata timotios shemor et-hapiqadon vehiteracheq midiverey hevel hapesulim umin-vikuchey hamada' haniqera khen beta'ut
asher yesh mitepaarim bo vayite'u min-haemuna hachesed 'imakh amen ﻿
